commands.name: generate

options.name: --assemblies
options.description:
Comma-separated list of assembly paths to
analyze

options.name: --format
options.description:
Serialization format for payload size calculation (json,
binary)

options.name: --github-url
options.description:
Base GitHub URL for source code links (e.g.,
https://github.com/org/repo/blob/main/src)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated markdown files

options.name: --sidebar-file
options.description: Name of the JSON sidebar file

options.name: --templates
options.description:
Custom templates directory to override default
templates

options.name: --xml-docs
options.description:
Comma-separated list of XML documentation file paths
(auto-discovered if not provided)

commands.description:
Generate markdown documentation from event 
assemblies

commands.name: templates

options.name: --force
options.description:
Overwrite existing template files if they
exist

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output directory for template files (defaults to
./templates)

commands.description:
Copy default templates to a local directory for 
customization
